description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a sprawling, asymmetrical footprint and a complex, multi-faceted brown gable roof. The exterior walls are primarily dark, with red and white trim accenting the windows and gable ends. The house features several windows of varying sizes, arranged in an irregular pattern, and a prominent front section with a covered entryway. The property includes a driveway or walkway area rendered in a striped pattern, suggesting a paved or concrete surface. The roof overhangs provide shade and architectural interest, while the overall structure sits on a flat, rectangular plot. The design is reminiscent of a modern ranch or craftsman style, with practical, suburban appeal.
description: A single-story, dark-walled house with a complex brown gable roof, red and white trim, and asymmetrical window placement, set on a rectangular lot with a striped driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, multiple windows, and the striped driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roofline, dark exterior walls, and a row of windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back gable, minimal window presence, and the continuation of the roof's complex geometry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the roof's overhangs, a single window, and the edge of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a prominent front door, small porch, and overhanging roof
